examples: I brought you back a macaroon.
IMAGINE a macaroon, its pink surface smooth and delicate as paper, crushing through into a soft crumb perfumed with rose petals.
After baking, turn over the chocolate macaroon. Let cool. Pipe chocolate ganache on top of it and then cover with another piece.
Finish off with a terrific strawberry macaroon.l Chez Michallet--90 Bedford St.
Burn it off by pounding the cobblestoned streets of Vieux-Lille (the old town), perhaps with a sinful stop-off at macaroon-maker Patrick Hermand on rue Basse.
